allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k,':',v\) for k,v in d.get\('exports',{}\).items\(\) if 'client' in k.lower\(\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k,':',v\) for k,v in d.get\('exports',{}\).items\(\) if 'streamable' in k.lower\(\) or 'http' in k.lower\(\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k\) for k in d.get\('exports',{}\).keys\(\)]")
